reply_original: Hello! I completely understand your frustration. Maintaining high-quality AI requires significant server costs, and we are working hard to find a balance and provide more ways to earn free messages. If you have any suggestions, please email support@fantachat.ai. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好！我完全理解你的沮丧。维护高质量的 AI 需要巨大的服务器成本，因此仅靠广告收入目前还无法为所有人提供无限次的聊天。我们正在努力寻找平衡点，并提供更多赚取免费消息的方式。如果你有任何建议，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。感谢你的耐心配合！
reply_original_before_override: Hi! I completely understand your frustration. Maintaining high-quality AI involves significant server costs, so ad revenue alone can't cover unlimited chats for everyone yet. We are working hard to find a balance and offer more ways to earn free messages. If you have suggestions, please email support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for your patience!
